steps.title: Apply the triangle angle sum theorem
steps.content:
The figure shows a triangle with interior angles labeled $x^{\circ}$, $y^{\circ}$, and $z^{\circ}$. The sum of the interior angles of any triangle equals $180^{\circ}$:
$$x + y + z = 180$$

steps.title: Substitute the given values and solve
steps.content:
Using the given values $y = 20$ and $z = 60$:
$$x + 20 + 60 = 180$$
$$x = 100$$
That is the correct answer.
